title: Hermitcraft TCG
description: Have you ever wanted to play VintageBeef's Hermitcraft TCG game in your own worlds? Well now you can!
body:
# Hermitcraft TCG Datapack

> Hermitcraft TCG is a serverwide minigame created by VintageBeef in Hermitcraft Seasons 9 & 10. If you've ever wanted to play it on your own world, now you can!
## Notes
- This is not my idea. If you like this minigame, go support [@VintageBeef](https://www.youtube.com/@VintageBeef) on YouTube.
- While this datapack is not my own unique idea, I have added multiple quality of life systems that weren't in the original.
- The datapack has currently only been tested in versions 1.21.5 & 1.21.8.


<details>
<summary>How to download</summary>

1. Download each of the files in versions (datapack, resourcepack, maps).
2. Drag the resource pack into your resourcepacks folder & enable it.
3. Drag datapack into your datapacks folder while creating the world & enable it.
4. Once the world has been created, extract the maps zip file in the /data/ folder of the world file.
5. You can now use the commands to give yourself the cards.

</details>



## Description
### Cards
Currently you can only get the cards via commands.
```
/function hctcg:give/#
```

<details>
<summary>Give Commands</summary>


<details>
<summary>Hermit</summary>

> /function hctcg:give/hermit/all

<details>
<summary>Default</summary>

> /function hctcg:give/hermit/default/all

> /function hctcg:give/hermit/default/common

> /function hctcg:give/hermit/default/rare

> /function hctcg:give/hermit/default/ultra_rare

</details>


<details>
<summary>Alter Ego</summary>

> /function hctcg:give/hermit/alter_ego/all

> /function hctcg:give/hermit/alter_ego/common

> /function hctcg:give/hermit/alter_ego/rare

</details>



</details>



<details>
<summary>Effects</summary>

> /function hctcg:give/effect/all
 
<details>
<summary>Default</summary>

> /function hctcg:give/effect/default/all

> /function hctcg:give/effect/default/common

> /function hctcg:give/effect/default/rare

> /function hctcg:give/effect/default/ultra_rare

</details>


<details>
<summary>Alter Ego</summary>

> /function hctcg:give/effect/alter_ego/all

> /function hctcg:give/effect/alter_ego/common

> /function hctcg:give/effect/alter_ego/rare

> /function hctcg:give/effect/alter_ego/ultra_rare

</details>



</details>


<details>
<summary>Item</summary>

> /function hctcg:give/item/all

> /function hctcg:give/item/1x

> /function hctcg:give/item/2x

</details>


<details>
<summary>Health</summary>

> /function hctcg:give/health/all

> /function hctcg:give/health/green

> /function hctcg:give/health/orange

> /function hctcg:give/health/red

</details>



<details>
<summary>Misc</summary>

> /function hctcg:give/misc/tcg_card

> /function hctcg:give/misc/strength_chart

</details>



</details>



## Future Features
### Planned
- Expansion pack api (for people to make addons)
- Chat menu to give the cards
- Loot table for each of the different pack types

### Maybe
- Downgrade to versions before 1.21.4
- Not require maps to be added to world files
